name: context-map
description: Two-layer agent docs: a committed agent-docs/ navigation tree (MAP + per-domain deep docs) and a gitignored context-map-<slug>/ memory tree (decisions, known issues, gotchas, tasks). Generate, decompose, update, audit, reconcile, and conflict-check project docs for AI coding agents — navigation that survives a big codebase plus memory that survives a context reset.
